metadata.description: Azure environment name (set automatically by azd)
Azure OpenAI endpoint (optional -- defaults to Foundry endpoint)
Azure OpenAI API key (optional -- defaults to Foundry key)
ACA Sandbox Group name used by Agent 1 for runtime sandbox creation
User-assigned identity name for ACA Sandbox Group
Content factory mode: lab (Azure OpenAI TTS) or full (GPU XTTS-v2)
Azure Storage connection string for podcast audio uploads

initContainers.name: model-prefetch
command: command -v huggingface-cli >/dev/null 2>&1 && { test -f /models/xtts-v2/config.json && echo "XTTS-v2 model cached on NFS" || { echo "Downloading XTTS-v2..." && huggingface-cli download coqui/XTTS-v2 --local-dir /models/xtts-v2 && echo "Download complete"; }; } || echo "Skipping model pull (placeholder image)"
